zh.lifeSummary: 當John Treadway於1375年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾特福布時，他的父親Treadway25歲，母親Margaret26歲。他和Martha Trugeon至少有1個兒子。他去世在英國可瓦爾特福布。

nameMeanings.name: Treadway
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English treden ‘to tread, trample’ + wei(e) ‘way’, perhaps used for a vagrant or a well-traveled man.

variants.name: Tredway
meanings: English: variant of   Treadway  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Treadway was born in 1375, in Treverbyn, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, his father, Treadway, was 25 and his mother, Margaret, was 26. He had at least 1 son with Martha Trugeon. He died in Treverbyn, Cornwall, England.

ja.Keverell, St Martin, Cornwall, England: イギリスイギリスコルンワルスト マルティン ビー ロオ

ko.Keverell, St Martin, Cornwall, England: 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 마틴 비 루
ko.lifeSummary: John Treadway(이)가 1375년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 트레버빈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Treadway(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Martha Trugeon(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 코른월 트레버빈에서 사망했다.
